songs.title: My Man on Willpower
feed: “My Man on Willpower” by Sabrina Carpenter returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 2nd nonconsecutive week at the top.
“My Man on Willpower” by Sabrina Carpenter is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 11,566 sales units.
“My Man on Willpower” by Sabrina Carpenter is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 85,960,875 streams units.
“My Man on Willpower” by Sabrina Carpenter is the #1 most airplayed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 72,739,800 airplay units.
“My Man on Willpower” by Sabrina Carpenter is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 393,693 total units.
